name: funeral_home_mass_grave_discovery
premise: Deputy coroner Alicia Boone discovers a hidden burial trench on the property of the only funeral home serving three rural counties after a storm exposes human remains near the tree line. Preliminary records suggest the current owner inherited decades of falsified cremation logs from his late father and may have quietly continued the practice during periods of financial distress. The owner is Alicia's godfather and one of the town's most trusted civic leaders, and he begs for forty-eight hours to notify families privately before law enforcement seals the property and the media arrives. State law requires Alicia to report suspected improper burial immediately, yet the trench includes remains from families who may have no surviving relatives and whose identities will be uncertain without a long forensic process. Alicia knows that delay could compromise evidence, but immediate disclosure will shatter a town already dependent on the funeral home for every service from burials to indigent cremations.

agents.name: Alicia Boone
agents.identity: I am the deputy coroner for a small county where professional duties and personal relationships overlap every day. I was raised to believe that public trust is hardest to protect precisely when the truth harms people we love.
agents.goal: I want to honor the dead and the families who were deceived without destroying evidence or acting from personal betrayal alone. I need to decide whether loyalty allows any delay once I know the grave exists.

agents.name: Harold Boone
agents.identity: I am the owner of the funeral home and Alicia's godfather, and I have spent forty years burying the town's poor when no one else would. I did not create all of this, but I know my family name now stands on top of it.
agents.goal: I want Alicia to give me two days to notify families quietly and preserve some dignity before deputies and cameras turn their grief into spectacle. I believe loyalty and mercy matter when the truth can no longer undo the original harm.

choices: I will report the burial trench to state authorities immediately and secure the property tonight, regardless of the personal and communal fallout.
I will wait forty-eight hours before filing the formal report so Harold can begin notifying affected families privately, accepting the risk of delayed evidence preservation.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Alicia Boone must decide whether to report the hidden burial trench immediately or allow a brief private delay. What does Alicia Boone do?
